project.name: Qure Desktop Suite - Desktop Application Development

phases.name: Desktop Application Foundation & Core Orchestration
phases.description: Establish desktop application foundation with modern UI framework, implement core service orchestration with Docker integration, create configuration management system with validation, and enable basic service lifecycle management.

tasks.name: Desktop Application Shell [CMP_DESKTOP_MANAGEMENT_INTERFACE]
tasks.description: Create the foundational desktop application with main window, navigation, and core UI components using Electron and React with TypeScript.
tasks.notes: Successfully implemented Electron application foundation with React UI, TypeScript configuration, navigation system with sidebar, responsive layout, window state management, application menu, and comprehensive routing system with placeholder pages for all main sections (Dashboard, Services, Configuration, Logs, Settings). Includes security best practices, cross-platform compatibility, and modern development tooling.

tasks.name: Ad-Hoc Docker Compose Backend Bundle [CMP_DOCKER_COMPOSE_BUNDLE]
tasks.description: Create single Docker compose file that starts both Middle Layer API and Agent services for early client deployment, enabling simple 'docker pull & run' workflow. Uses Docker socket mounting to enable Agent's container orchestration capabilities for test execution.
tasks.notes: Successfully implemented unified Docker container solution with Middle API + Agent using supervisord process management. Features: Docker socket mounting for Agent's test container orchestration, multi-stage build for optimal image size, comprehensive health monitoring, production-ready deployment scripts, and complete documentation. All components tested and validated for Docker Compose deployment.

tasks.name: Service Configuration Management [CMP_CONFIG_MANAGER]
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive configuration management with validation, persistence, user interface, and secure storage for sensitive data.

tasks.name: Docker Integration Foundation [CMP_ORCHESTRATION_ENGINE]
tasks.description: Implement core Docker integration for container management and basic orchestration with Docker Engine API client and container lifecycle management.

tasks.name: Service Bundle Integration [CMP_INTEGRATED_SERVICES]
tasks.description: Package and integrate existing services (Middle API, Agent) with desktop application including pre-configured containers and JAR packaging.

deliverables: Fully functional desktop application with service management interface
Configuration management system with wizard-based setup
Docker integration with container lifecycle management
Service bundling with automated configuration generation
Service orchestration system with automated startup/shutdown
Port allocation and conflict resolution system
success_criteria: ✅ Desktop application starts successfully on all target platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux)
✅ Configuration wizard completes successfully with valid service setup
✅ Services start and stop reliably through desktop interface
✅ Service health status accurately reflects operational state
✅ One-click service startup completes within 120 seconds
✅ Configuration changes apply without requiring application restart
✅ Docker integration handles connection failures gracefully

phases.name: Advanced Monitoring & Configuration Management
phases.description: Implement comprehensive service monitoring with real-time dashboards, add advanced configuration management with validation and troubleshooting, create integrated logging and diagnostic capabilities.

tasks.name: Advanced Health Monitoring [CMP_HEALTH_MONITOR]
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive health monitoring system with real-time metrics, alerting, and performance monitoring with resource utilization tracking.

tasks.name: Log Aggregation & Troubleshooting [CMP_LOG_AGGREGATOR]
tasks.description: Implement centralized logging system with advanced troubleshooting capabilities, diagnostic tools, and guided problem resolution.

tasks.name: Enhanced Configuration Management [CMP_CONFIG_MANAGER_ADVANCED]
tasks.description: Extend configuration management with advanced validation, templates, environment management, and migration capabilities.

tasks.name: Service Recovery & Auto-healing [CMP_SERVICE_RECOVERY]
tasks.description: Implement intelligent service recovery with auto-healing capabilities, dependency-aware recovery, and failure pattern analysis.

deliverables: Real-time service health dashboard with metrics and alerts
Comprehensive log aggregation with advanced filtering and search
Diagnostic tools with automated issue detection and resolution
Service recovery automation with intelligent healing capabilities
Advanced configuration templates with environment adaptation
Enhanced validation with cross-service dependency checking
success_criteria: ✅ Health status updates appear within 5 seconds of status changes
✅ Metrics collection maintains <1% CPU overhead
✅ Service failures detected within 30 seconds of occurrence
✅ Automatic recovery succeeds in >90% of common failure scenarios
✅ Configuration validation prevents >95% of invalid configurations
✅ Log aggregation processes messages with <5 second delay
✅ Recovery operations complete within 60 seconds

phases.name: Chrome Extension Integration & User Experience Polish
phases.description: Integrate Chrome Extension installation and configuration automation, polish user interface with enhanced usability and visual design, implement comprehensive user onboarding and help system.

tasks.name: Chrome Extension Integration [CMP_EXTENSION_HELPER]
tasks.description: Implement Chrome Extension installation automation, configuration synchronization, browser detection, and extension communication testing.

tasks.name: User Interface Polish & Enhancement [CMP_UI_ENHANCEMENT]
tasks.description: Enhance user interface with improved design, usability, accessibility features, and modern visual language with theme support.

tasks.name: User Onboarding & Help System [CMP_ONBOARDING]
tasks.description: Create comprehensive onboarding experience and integrated help system with interactive guidance and contextual assistance.

deliverables: Automated extension installation and configuration system
Browser detection with extension status monitoring
Configuration synchronization with automatic updates
Polished UI with modern design and accessibility features
Comprehensive onboarding with interactive guidance
Integrated help system with contextual assistance
success_criteria: ✅ Extension installation success rate >90% across supported browsers
✅ Configuration synchronization completes within 10 seconds
✅ Extension connectivity validation reports accurate status
✅ Onboarding completion rate >95% for new users
✅ User task completion time reduced >60% vs manual setup
✅ Accessibility compliance verified with automated testing tools
✅ User satisfaction score >4.5/5 in initial user testing

phases.name: Distribution & Packaging
phases.description: Create platform-specific installation packages with automated installers, implement application update system with automatic distribution, establish distribution pipeline with code signing and notarization.

tasks.name: Cross-Platform Installer Development [CMP_INSTALLER_SYSTEM]
tasks.description: Create platform-specific installers with dependency validation, automated setup for Windows MSI, macOS DMG, and Linux packages.

tasks.name: Application Update System [CMP_UPDATE_SYSTEM]
tasks.description: Implement automatic update system with staged rollout, rollback capabilities, secure download, and signature verification.

tasks.name: Distribution Pipeline & Code Signing [CMP_DISTRIBUTION]
tasks.description: Establish automated distribution pipeline with code signing, release management, and security scanning integration.

deliverables: Cross-platform installers for Windows, macOS, and Linux
Automatic update system with secure distribution
Code signing and notarization for all platforms
Distribution pipeline with release management
Complete application documentation and user guides
Production-ready build and deployment system
success_criteria: ✅ Installer success rate >95% across all target platforms
✅ Installation time <5 minutes including dependency setup
✅ Update system delivers updates within 24 hours of release
✅ Code signing validation passes on all platforms
✅ Distribution pipeline builds complete within 30 minutes
✅ Complete uninstallation with <1% residual files
✅ Release management supports rollback within 1 hour

notes: Project follows framework standards with component ID tracking for full traceability
Each phase has clear dependencies and measurable success criteria
Parallel development opportunities identified between independent components
Risk mitigation strategies included for high-risk components
Quality gates established between phases to ensure systematic progression
Technical and business success metrics defined for project evaluation
Component Integration Specification added covering all three existing components
Integration strategies defined for Chrome Extension, Middle API, and Agent components
